task_completion.description: Locate the specific alert with the target message and severity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list, table, or dashboard of alerts showing an entry with the message 'CORE_DUMP_DETECTED_001' and an 'Emergency' severity indicator.

task_completion.description: Open the detailed view for the target alert.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A detailed view, modal, or dedicated page specifically displaying the details of the 'CORE_DUMP_DETECTED_001' alert.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the worklog, notes, or comments section of the alert.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A specific tab, panel, or input area designated for adding a 'Worklog', 'Note', or 'Comment' is active or opened within the alert details.

task_completion.description: Enter the required worklog note text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Initial triage complete. Escalating to L2.' is typed into the worklog/note input field.

task_completion.description: Save the note and verify it has been added to the alert.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The note 'Initial triage complete. Escalating to L2.' appears as a saved, submitted entry in the alert's worklog or notes history.

integrity.description: The agent must use the application's graphical user interface to add the note.
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions are performed within a web browser showing the log management application UI, rather than using a terminal to send API requests (e.g., curl).

integrity.description: The agent must interact with the actual incident/log management application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface belongs to the actual application (e.g., EventLog Analyzer or similar tool), not a generic text editor, notepad, or a locally created mock HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent must not bypass the application UI by directly modifying backend files or databases.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows visible where the agent is directly appending the note text to log files or injecting it into a database via command line.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Alert Message: 'CORE_DUMP_DETECTED_001'. Target Severity: 'Emergency'. Exact Note Text required: 'Initial triage complete. Escalating to L2.'.
